selection.required: strictly improve control in both threshold and adverse bar fills
selection.tie_break: maximum of the smaller normal/adverse pass-rate delta, then lower weight

candidate_limitations: No 2025 trades; the strict annual-density gate fails.
2019 and 2021 current-cost calendar years are negative.
Any result remains research-only until the complete nested portfolio sequence passes.
label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
